---
title: "Cargo Data Cleaning"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r location}
getwd()
intermediate_path <- paste0(getwd(), '/00_DataPrep/IntermediateOutput/')
output_path <- paste0(getwd(), '/00_DataPrep/OutputData/')
list.files(intermediate_path)
```

```{r Cargo Basic Joining}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

# Stage 1: Load Raw Data
cargo_freq_raw    <- read_csv(paste0(intermediate_path,"cargo_claim_freq.csv"))
cargo_sev_raw    <- read_csv(paste0(intermediate_path,"cargo_claim_sev.csv"))
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_freq_raw
cargo_claim_sev  <- cargo_sev_raw

########################## Data mapping for join ###################################

# Stage 2: Policy_id & shipment_id formatting for join
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>% mutate( policy_id = sub("_.*", "", policy_id),  shipment_id = sub("_.*", "", shipment_id))
cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>% mutate( policy_id = sub("_.*", "", policy_id),  shipment_id = sub("_.*", "", shipment_id))

#### Check if there is multiple policy_id with same shipment_id - shipment in freq that linked to multiple policies
multi_policy_shipments <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  filter(!is.na(shipment_id), !is.na(policy_id)) %>%
  group_by(shipment_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_policies = n_distinct(policy_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_policies > 1)

#### Check shipment_id with blank policy_id - shipments in sev that have no policy_id
sev_na_shipments <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  filter(is.na(policy_id), !is.na(shipment_id)) %>%
  distinct(shipment_id)

#### identify blank policy_id in sev that have multiple policyid in freq table - in this case multi match
problem_shipments <- multi_policy_shipments %>%
  semi_join(sev_na_shipments, by = "shipment_id")

#### view NA claim count
 View(cargo_claim_freq %>% filter(is.na(claim_count)))

# Stage 3: mapping 
# Fill up blank policy_id in sev table 
# 1) Build a shipment_id -> policy_id "best match" map from frequency table
shipment_policy_map <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  filter(!is.na(shipment_id), !is.na(policy_id)) %>%
  group_by(shipment_id, policy_id) %>%
  summarise(
    claim_count = sum(claim_count, na.rm=TRUE),  # use sum because there are na input cause warning message 
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(shipment_id) %>%
  mutate(
    n_policies = n_distinct(policy_id),
    has_claim  = claim_count > 0
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    shipment_id,
    desc(has_claim),       # prefer claim_count > 0 when multiple policies
    desc(claim_count),     # then highest claim_count
    policy_id              # tie-breaker (stable)
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    policy_id_fill = first(policy_id),  # winner after sorting rules
    n_policies = first(n_policies),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 1.1) Fill missing policy_id in severity table using the map
cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  left_join(shipment_policy_map, by = "shipment_id") %>%
  mutate(
    policy_id = if_else(is.na(policy_id), policy_id_fill, policy_id)
  ) %>%
   dplyr::select(-policy_id_fill, -n_policies) # remove helper column

### check
sum(is.na(cargo_claim_sev$shipment_id))
cargo_claim_sev %>% filter(is.na(shipment_id)) %>% summarise(has_policy_id = sum(!is.na(policy_id)),no_policy_id = sum(is.na(policy_id)))


# Fill up blank shipment_id in sev table 
# 2) Build a policy_id > shipment_id "best match" map from frequency table - use for fill up shipmentid in sev table 
policy_shipment_map <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  filter(!is.na(policy_id), !is.na(shipment_id)) %>%
  group_by(policy_id, shipment_id) %>%
  summarise(
    claim_count = sum(claim_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(policy_id) %>%
  arrange(
    policy_id,
    desc(claim_count),  # prefer highest claim count
    shipment_id         # tie-breaker (stable)
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    shipment_id_fill = first(shipment_id),  # winner after sorting
    n_shipments = n_distinct(shipment_id),  # flag how many shipments
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 2.1) Fill missing shipment_id in severity table using the map 
cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>% #eg CL-027246 CL-886939
  left_join(policy_shipment_map, by = "policy_id") %>%
  mutate(
    shipment_id = if_else(
      is.na(shipment_id),
      shipment_id_fill,
      shipment_id
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-shipment_id_fill, -n_shipments)

##### sense checking sev table
any(is.na(cargo_claim_sev$policy_id)) #FALSE
any(is.na(cargo_claim_sev$shipment_id)) #FALSE
nrow(cargo_claim_sev) #30650

##### Separate sev with no policy_id and no shipment_id (they are exclusive)
any(is.na(cargo_claim_sev$policy_id)) #FALSE
any(is.na(cargo_claim_sev$shipment_id)) #FALSE


# Fill up blank shipment_id in freq table 
# 3) Build a policy_id > shipment_id "best match" map from sev table
sev_policy_shipment_map <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  filter(!is.na(policy_id), !is.na(shipment_id)) %>%
  group_by(policy_id, shipment_id) %>%
  summarise(
    claim_amount = sum(claim_amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(policy_id) %>%
  arrange(policy_id, desc(claim_amount), shipment_id) %>%
  summarise(
    shipment_id_fill = first(shipment_id),
    n_shipments = n_distinct(shipment_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 3.1) Fill missing shipment_id using freq's own map
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  left_join(policy_shipment_map, by = "policy_id") %>%
  mutate(shipment_id = if_else(is.na(shipment_id), shipment_id_fill, shipment_id)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-shipment_id_fill, -n_shipments)

# 3.2) Those not found in own freq map, fill remaining missing shipment_id using sev map
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  left_join(sev_policy_shipment_map, by = "policy_id") %>%
  mutate(shipment_id = if_else(is.na(shipment_id), shipment_id_fill, shipment_id)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-shipment_id_fill, -n_shipments)

### Fill up blank policy_id in freq table 
# 4) Build a shipment_id > policy_id "best match" map from sev table
sev_shipment_policy_map <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  filter(!is.na(policy_id), !is.na(shipment_id)) %>%
  group_by(shipment_id, policy_id) %>%
  summarise(
    claim_amount = sum(claim_amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(shipment_id) %>%
  arrange(shipment_id, desc(claim_amount), policy_id) %>%
  summarise(
    policy_id_fill = first(policy_id),
    n_policies = n_distinct(policy_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 4.1) Fill missing shipment_id using freq's own map
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  left_join(shipment_policy_map, by = "shipment_id") %>%
  mutate(policy_id = if_else(is.na(policy_id), policy_id_fill, policy_id)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-policy_id_fill, -n_policies)

# 4.2) Those not found in own freq map, fill remaining missing policyid using sev map
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  left_join(sev_shipment_policy_map, by = "shipment_id") %>%
  mutate(
    policy_id = if_else(is.na(policy_id), policy_id_fill, policy_id)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-policy_id_fill, -n_policies)

sum(is.na(cargo_claim_freq$shipment_id)) # 197
sum(is.na(cargo_claim_freq$policy_id)) # 220
nrow(cargo_claim_freq) # should still be 124982

#### check what cause na in freq table 
cargo_claim_freq %>% # claim_count =0 and na make up can't match
  filter(is.na(policy_id)) %>%
  count(claim_count)
cargo_claim_freq %>%
  filter(is.na(shipment_id)) %>% # claim_count =0 and na make up can't match
  count(claim_count)

# Sev table: fully mapped — all missing policy_id and shipment_id successfully filled using best-match maps from both freq and sev tables.
# Freq table: Partially mapped — remaining missing values are acceptable because:
# 219/220 missing policy_id rows have claim_count = 0
# 195/197 missing shipment_id rows have claim_count = 0
# Remaining NAs (1-2 rows each) have claim_count = NA
# None of these rows have actual claims to link to the sev table, so they won't affect the analysis

########################## Data cleaning for freq and sev ###################################

# Save clean ID versions as checkpoints (create copy)
freq_clean_id <- cargo_claim_freq
sev_clean_id  <- cargo_claim_sev

# Verify
nrow(freq_clean_id) # 124,982
nrow(sev_clean_id)  # 30,650

# Stage 4: Fix the missing inputs for all columns 
### check missing input in each columns - all less than 0.25%
cargo_claim_freq %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  glimpse()
cargo_claim_sev %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  glimpse()

# install.packages("tidyr")
library(tidyr)

# Freq table missing value summary
freq_missing <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "missing") %>%
  mutate(pct = round(missing / nrow(cargo_claim_freq) * 100, 2)) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing))

print(freq_missing)

# Sev table missing value summary
sev_missing <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "missing") %>%
  mutate(pct = round(missing / nrow(cargo_claim_sev) * 100, 2)) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing))

print(sev_missing)


# Stage 5: resolve the missing value 
# Step 1: Build sev lookup 
sev_lookup <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  filter(!is.na(policy_id), !is.na(shipment_id)) %>%
  mutate(
    n_complete = rowSums(!is.na(across(where(is.numeric))))
  ) %>%
  group_by(policy_id, shipment_id) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_complete), .by_group = TRUE) %>% #picking the row with the most complete information (least NAs)
  summarise(
    solar_radiation_sev  = first(na.omit(solar_radiation)),
    debris_density_sev   = first(na.omit(debris_density)),
    exposure_sev         = first(na.omit(exposure)),
    cargo_value_sev      = first(na.omit(cargo_value)),
    weight_sev           = first(na.omit(weight)),
    distance_sev         = first(na.omit(distance)),
    transit_duration_sev = first(na.omit(transit_duration)),
    pilot_experience_sev = first(na.omit(pilot_experience)),
    vessel_age_sev       = first(na.omit(vessel_age)),
    route_risk_sev       = first(na.omit(route_risk)),
    cargo_type_sev       = first(na.omit(cargo_type)),
    container_type_sev   = first(na.omit(container_type)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 1.1: Apply sev lookup to fill freq missing values 
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  left_join(sev_lookup, by = c("policy_id", "shipment_id")) %>%
  mutate(
    solar_radiation  = if_else(is.na(solar_radiation), solar_radiation_sev, solar_radiation),
    debris_density   = if_else(is.na(debris_density), debris_density_sev, debris_density),
    exposure         = if_else(is.na(exposure), exposure_sev, exposure),
    cargo_value      = if_else(is.na(cargo_value), cargo_value_sev, cargo_value),
    weight           = if_else(is.na(weight), weight_sev, weight),
    distance         = if_else(is.na(distance), distance_sev, distance),
    transit_duration = if_else(is.na(transit_duration), transit_duration_sev, transit_duration),
    pilot_experience = if_else(is.na(pilot_experience), pilot_experience_sev, pilot_experience),
    vessel_age       = if_else(is.na(vessel_age), vessel_age_sev, vessel_age),
    route_risk       = if_else(is.na(route_risk), route_risk_sev, route_risk),
    cargo_type       = if_else(is.na(cargo_type), cargo_type_sev, cargo_type),
    container_type   = if_else(is.na(container_type), container_type_sev, container_type)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-ends_with("_sev"))

# Step 2: Build freq lookup to fill sev missing values
freq_lookup <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  filter(!is.na(policy_id), !is.na(shipment_id)) %>%
  mutate(
    n_complete = rowSums(!is.na(across(where(is.numeric))))
  ) %>%
  group_by(policy_id, shipment_id) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_complete), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  summarise(
    solar_radiation_freq  = first(na.omit(solar_radiation)),
    debris_density_freq   = first(na.omit(debris_density)),
    exposure_freq         = first(na.omit(exposure)),
    cargo_value_freq      = first(na.omit(cargo_value)),
    weight_freq           = first(na.omit(weight)),
    distance_freq         = first(na.omit(distance)),
    transit_duration_freq = first(na.omit(transit_duration)),
    pilot_experience_freq = first(na.omit(pilot_experience)),
    vessel_age_freq       = first(na.omit(vessel_age)),
    route_risk_freq       = first(na.omit(route_risk)),
    cargo_type_freq       = first(na.omit(cargo_type)),
    container_type_freq   = first(na.omit(container_type)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 2.1 — Apply freq lookup to fill sev missing values:
cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  left_join(freq_lookup, by = c("policy_id", "shipment_id")) %>%
  mutate(
    solar_radiation  = if_else(is.na(solar_radiation), solar_radiation_freq, solar_radiation),
    debris_density   = if_else(is.na(debris_density), debris_density_freq, debris_density),
    exposure         = if_else(is.na(exposure), exposure_freq, exposure),
    cargo_value      = if_else(is.na(cargo_value), cargo_value_freq, cargo_value),
    weight           = if_else(is.na(weight), weight_freq, weight),
    distance         = if_else(is.na(distance), distance_freq, distance),
    transit_duration = if_else(is.na(transit_duration), transit_duration_freq, transit_duration),
    pilot_experience = if_else(is.na(pilot_experience), pilot_experience_freq, pilot_experience),
    vessel_age       = if_else(is.na(vessel_age), vessel_age_freq, vessel_age),
    route_risk       = if_else(is.na(route_risk), route_risk_freq, route_risk),
    cargo_type       = if_else(is.na(cargo_type), cargo_type_freq, cargo_type),
    container_type   = if_else(is.na(container_type), container_type_freq, container_type)
  ) %>%
 dplyr::select(-ends_with("_freq"))

# Step 3: Verify both tables
# Check remaining missing values
cargo_claim_freq %>% #improved but still blanks
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  glimpse()

cargo_claim_sev %>% #almost perfect
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  glimpse()

# Check row counts
nrow(cargo_claim_freq) # 124,982
nrow(cargo_claim_sev)  # 30,650

## Stage 5.1
# Clean severity dataset 
cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(claim_amount),          # remove NAs
    claim_amount > 0,              # remove negatives
    claim_amount <= 678000000      # remove above upper bound (~678,000K)
  )

nrow(cargo_claim_sev) # 30,558 (30650 - 44 unmatched row in freq - 45 negative $ - 3 huge $ ) # 45 -ve, 2233 below 31k, 3 exceed upper bound

# Stage 6 — Set Out-of-Range Values to NA in FREQ table:
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  mutate(
    claim_count      = if_else(claim_count < 0 | claim_count > 5, NA_real_, claim_count),
    cargo_value      = if_else(cargo_value < 50000 | cargo_value > 680000000, NA_real_, cargo_value),
    weight           = if_else(weight < 1500 | weight > 250000, NA_real_, weight),
    distance         = if_else(distance < 1 | distance > 100, NA_real_, distance),
    transit_duration = if_else(transit_duration < 1 | transit_duration > 60, NA_real_, transit_duration),
    pilot_experience = if_else(pilot_experience < 1 | pilot_experience > 30, NA_real_, pilot_experience),
    vessel_age       = if_else(vessel_age < 1 | vessel_age > 50, NA_real_, vessel_age),
    solar_radiation  = if_else(solar_radiation < 0 | solar_radiation > 1, NA_real_, solar_radiation),
    debris_density   = if_else(debris_density < 0 | debris_density > 1, NA_real_, debris_density),
    exposure         = if_else(exposure < 0 | exposure > 1, NA_real_, exposure),
    route_risk       = if_else(!route_risk %in% 1:5, NA_real_, route_risk)
  )

# Stage 6 — Set Out-of-Range Values to NA in SEV table:
cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  mutate(
    cargo_value      = if_else(cargo_value < 50000 | cargo_value > 680000000, NA_real_, cargo_value),
    weight           = if_else(weight < 1500 | weight > 250000, NA_real_, weight),
    distance         = if_else(distance < 1 | distance > 100, NA_real_, distance),
    transit_duration = if_else(transit_duration < 1 | transit_duration > 60, NA_real_, transit_duration),
    pilot_experience = if_else(pilot_experience < 1 | pilot_experience > 30, NA_real_, pilot_experience),
    vessel_age       = if_else(vessel_age < 1 | vessel_age > 50, NA_real_, vessel_age),
    solar_radiation  = if_else(solar_radiation < 0 | solar_radiation > 1, NA_real_, solar_radiation),
    debris_density   = if_else(debris_density < 0 | debris_density > 1, NA_real_, debris_density),
    exposure         = if_else(exposure < 0 | exposure > 1, NA_real_, exposure),
    route_risk       = if_else(!route_risk %in% 1:5, NA_real_, route_risk)
  )

######### LOGIC: numeric column = median (take into acc only in range compute median, otherwise the median could be out of range), categorical column = mode, claim count NA impute with 0

# Stage 7: Impute remaining NAs with median/mode
get_mode <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

# FREQ table
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  mutate(
    claim_count      = if_else(is.na(claim_count), 0, claim_count),
    cargo_value      = if_else(is.na(cargo_value), median(cargo_value, na.rm = TRUE), cargo_value),
    weight           = if_else(is.na(weight), median(weight, na.rm = TRUE), weight),
    distance         = if_else(is.na(distance), median(distance, na.rm = TRUE), distance),
    transit_duration = if_else(is.na(transit_duration), median(transit_duration, na.rm = TRUE), transit_duration),
    pilot_experience = if_else(is.na(pilot_experience), median(pilot_experience, na.rm = TRUE), pilot_experience),
    vessel_age       = if_else(is.na(vessel_age), median(vessel_age, na.rm = TRUE), vessel_age),
    solar_radiation  = if_else(is.na(solar_radiation), median(solar_radiation, na.rm = TRUE), solar_radiation),
    debris_density   = if_else(is.na(debris_density), median(debris_density, na.rm = TRUE), debris_density),
    exposure         = if_else(is.na(exposure), median(exposure, na.rm = TRUE), exposure),
    cargo_type       = if_else(is.na(cargo_type), get_mode(cargo_type), cargo_type),
    container_type   = if_else(is.na(container_type), get_mode(container_type), container_type),
    route_risk       = if_else(is.na(route_risk), get_mode(route_risk), route_risk)
  )

# SEV table
cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  mutate(
    cargo_value      = if_else(is.na(cargo_value), median(cargo_value, na.rm = TRUE), cargo_value),
    weight           = if_else(is.na(weight), median(weight, na.rm = TRUE), weight),
    distance         = if_else(is.na(distance), median(distance, na.rm = TRUE), distance),
    transit_duration = if_else(is.na(transit_duration), median(transit_duration, na.rm = TRUE), transit_duration),
    pilot_experience = if_else(is.na(pilot_experience), median(pilot_experience, na.rm = TRUE), pilot_experience),
    vessel_age       = if_else(is.na(vessel_age), median(vessel_age, na.rm = TRUE), vessel_age),
    solar_radiation  = if_else(is.na(solar_radiation), median(solar_radiation, na.rm = TRUE), solar_radiation),
    debris_density   = if_else(is.na(debris_density), median(debris_density, na.rm = TRUE), debris_density),
    exposure         = if_else(is.na(exposure), median(exposure, na.rm = TRUE), exposure),
    cargo_type       = if_else(is.na(cargo_type), get_mode(cargo_type), cargo_type),
    container_type   = if_else(is.na(container_type), get_mode(container_type), container_type),
    route_risk       = if_else(is.na(route_risk), get_mode(route_risk), route_risk)
  )

##### Stage 8 — Fix dirty character columns
# Step 1 — Strip everything after first underscore for ALL character columns
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ sub("_.*", "", .x)))

cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ sub("_.*", "", .x)))

# Step 2 — Safety fix for cargo_type (in case special characters bypass sub())
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  mutate(
    cargo_type = case_when(
      grepl("platinum", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "platinum",
      grepl("gold", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)        ~ "gold",
      grepl("cobalt", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)      ~ "cobalt",
      grepl("lithium", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)     ~ "lithium",
      grepl("supplies", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "supplies",
      grepl("titanium", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "titanium",
      grepl("rare earths", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "rare earths",
      TRUE ~ cargo_type
    )
  )

cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  mutate(
    cargo_type = case_when(
      grepl("platinum", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "platinum",
      grepl("gold", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)        ~ "gold",
      grepl("cobalt", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)      ~ "cobalt",
      grepl("lithium", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)     ~ "lithium",
      grepl("supplies", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "supplies",
      grepl("titanium", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "titanium",
      grepl("rare earths", cargo_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "rare earths",
      TRUE ~ cargo_type
    )
  )

# Step 3 — Safety fix for container_type
cargo_claim_freq <- cargo_claim_freq %>%
  mutate(
    container_type = case_when(
      grepl("DeepSpace", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "DeepSpace Haulbox",
      grepl("HardSeal", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE)     ~ "HardSeal Transit Crate",
      grepl("DockArc", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE)      ~ "DockArc Freight Case",
      grepl("QuantumCrate", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "QuantumCrate Module",
      grepl("LongHaul", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE)     ~ "LongHaul Vault Canister",
      TRUE ~ container_type
    )
  )

cargo_claim_sev <- cargo_claim_sev %>%
  mutate(
    container_type = case_when(
      grepl("DeepSpace", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "DeepSpace Haulbox",
      grepl("HardSeal", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE)     ~ "HardSeal Transit Crate",
      grepl("DockArc", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE)      ~ "DockArc Freight Case",
      grepl("QuantumCrate", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "QuantumCrate Module",
      grepl("LongHaul", container_type, ignore.case = TRUE)     ~ "LongHaul Vault Canister",
      TRUE ~ container_type
    )
  )

# Step 4 — Verify
sort(unique(cargo_claim_freq$cargo_type))      # 7 values
sort(unique(cargo_claim_freq$container_type))  # 5 values
sort(unique(cargo_claim_sev$cargo_type))       # 7 values
sort(unique(cargo_claim_sev$container_type))   # 5 values


##### Stage 9: Final Verification
# Check no remaining NAs
cargo_claim_freq %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  glimpse()
nrow(cargo_claim_freq) # should be 124,982

cargo_claim_sev %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  glimpse()
nrow(cargo_claim_sev) # should be 30,558

# Check no out-of-range values
cargo_claim_freq %>%
  summarise(
    n_negative_count  = sum(claim_count < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_exceeds_5_count = sum(claim_count > 5, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_cargo_value = sum(cargo_value < 50000 | cargo_value > 680000000, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_weight      = sum(weight < 1500 | weight > 250000, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_distance    = sum(distance < 1 | distance > 100, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_transit     = sum(transit_duration < 1 | transit_duration > 60, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_pilot       = sum(pilot_experience < 1 | pilot_experience > 30, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_vessel      = sum(vessel_age < 1 | vessel_age > 50, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_solar       = sum(solar_radiation < 0 | solar_radiation > 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_debris      = sum(debris_density < 0 | debris_density > 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_exposure    = sum(exposure < 0 | exposure > 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_route       = sum(!route_risk %in% 1:5, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

cargo_claim_sev %>%
  summarise(
    n_negative_amount = sum(claim_amount < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_exceeds_amount  = sum(claim_amount > 678000000, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_cargo_value = sum(cargo_value < 50000 | cargo_value > 680000000, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_weight      = sum(weight < 1500 | weight > 250000, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_distance    = sum(distance < 1 | distance > 100, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_transit     = sum(transit_duration < 1 | transit_duration > 60, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_pilot       = sum(pilot_experience < 1 | pilot_experience > 30, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_vessel      = sum(vessel_age < 1 | vessel_age > 50, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_solar       = sum(solar_radiation < 0 | solar_radiation > 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_debris      = sum(debris_density < 0 | debris_density > 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_exposure    = sum(exposure < 0 | exposure > 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_out_route       = sum(!route_risk %in% 1:5, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Stage 10
## Range Checks — cargo_freq_model_clean ###
cat("=== FREQ TABLE RANGE CHECKS ===\n")
# 1. claim_count (valid: 0-5)
cat("claim_count:", min(cargo_claim_freq$claim_count), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$claim_count), "\n")
# 2. cargo_value (valid: 50K-680,000K)
cat("cargo_value:", format(min(cargo_claim_freq$cargo_value), scientific = FALSE), "to", format(max(cargo_claim_freq$cargo_value), scientific = FALSE), "\n")
# 3. weight (valid: 1,500-250,000)
cat("weight:", min(cargo_claim_freq$weight), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$weight), "\n")
# 4. route_risk (valid: 1-5)
cat("route_risk unique values:", unique(sort(cargo_claim_freq$route_risk)), "\n")
# 5. distance (valid: 1-100)
cat("distance:", min(cargo_claim_freq$distance), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$distance), "\n")
# 6. transit_duration (valid: 1-60)
cat("transit_duration:", min(cargo_claim_freq$transit_duration), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$transit_duration), "\n")
# 7. pilot_experience (valid: 1-30)
cat("pilot_experience:", min(cargo_claim_freq$pilot_experience), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$pilot_experience), "\n")
# 8. vessel_age (valid: 1-50)
cat("vessel_age:", min(cargo_claim_freq$vessel_age), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$vessel_age), "\n")
# 9. solar_radiation (valid: 0-1)
cat("solar_radiation:", min(cargo_claim_freq$solar_radiation), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$solar_radiation), "\n")
# 10. debris_density (valid: 0-1)
cat("debris_density:", min(cargo_claim_freq$debris_density), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$debris_density), "\n")
# 11. exposure (valid: 0-1)
cat("exposure:", min(cargo_claim_freq$exposure), "to", max(cargo_claim_freq$exposure), "\n")
# 12. cargo_type (categorical)
cat("cargo_type unique values:", unique(cargo_claim_freq$cargo_type), "\n")
# 13. container_type (categorical)
cat("container_type unique values:", unique(cargo_claim_freq$container_type), "\n")
# Check a few raw values
head(cargo_claim_freq$cargo_type, 20) # Should only be: platinum, gold, cobalt, lithium, supplies, titanium, rare earths

### Range Checks — cargo_sev_model_clean ####
cat("\n=== SEV TABLE RANGE CHECKS ===\n")
# 1. claim_amount (valid: ~31K-678,000K)
cat("claim_amount:", min(cargo_claim_sev$claim_amount), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$claim_amount), "\n")
# 2. cargo_value (valid: 50K-680,000K)
cat("cargo_value:", min(cargo_claim_sev$cargo_value), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$cargo_value), "\n")
# 3. weight (valid: 1,500-250,000)
cat("weight:", min(cargo_claim_sev$weight), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$weight), "\n")
# 4. route_risk (valid: 1-5)
cat("route_risk unique values:", unique(sort(cargo_claim_sev$route_risk)), "\n")
# 5. distance (valid: 1-100)
cat("distance:", min(cargo_claim_sev$distance), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$distance), "\n")
# 6. transit_duration (valid: 1-60)
cat("transit_duration:", min(cargo_claim_sev$transit_duration), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$transit_duration), "\n")
# 7. pilot_experience (valid: 1-30)
cat("pilot_experience:", min(cargo_claim_sev$pilot_experience), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$pilot_experience), "\n")
# 8. vessel_age (valid: 1-50)
cat("vessel_age:", min(cargo_claim_sev$vessel_age), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$vessel_age), "\n")
# 9. solar_radiation (valid: 0-1)
cat("solar_radiation:", min(cargo_claim_sev$solar_radiation), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$solar_radiation), "\n")
# 10. debris_density (valid: 0-1)
cat("debris_density:", min(cargo_claim_sev$debris_density), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$debris_density), "\n")
# 11. exposure (valid: 0-1)
cat("exposure:", min(cargo_claim_sev$exposure), "to", max(cargo_claim_sev$exposure), "\n")
# 12. cargo_type (categorical)
cat("cargo_type unique values:", unique(cargo_claim_sev$cargo_type), "\n")
# 13. container_type (categorical)
cat("container_type unique values:", unique(cargo_claim_sev$container_type), "\n")


# Stage 11 - Export CSV
options(scipen = 999)

## Export clean data
write.csv(
  cargo_claim_freq,
  file.path(output_path, "cargo_claim_freq_update1.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE 
)
write.csv(
  cargo_claim_sev,
  file.path(output_path, "cargo_claim_sev_update1.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

```
